hero.title: The taste of Spain, on the move
hero.subtitle: Freshly made products inspired by Spanish tradition, present at fairs, markets and festivals across different cities in Switzerland.

classic.title: Traditional churro
classic.desc: Classic recipe, freshly made and crispy.

filled.title: Hot chocolate
filled.desc: The traditional accompaniment, intense and creamy.

signature.title: Coffee
signature.desc: A simple option to complement every moment.

specials.title: Special options
specials.desc: Sugar, cinnamon and different presentations depending on the event.

story.title: Who are we?
story.paragraph:
We are a group of people united by one shared idea: bringing the traditional flavors of Spain to different corners of Switzerland.

Through a close, carefully crafted approach, we offer a proposal inspired by a tradition deeply rooted in our culture.

Our goal is to create authentic experiences at fairs, markets and festivals, where each stop becomes an opportunity to share something more than just a product.

events.title: Where to find us
events.paragraphOne: We move across different cities in Switzerland, taking part in fairs, markets and festivals throughout the year.
events.paragraphTwo: Each stop is a new opportunity to keep sharing our concept and bring Spanish flavor to new places.

contact.title: We are here for you
contact.subtitle: If you want to organize an event or collaborate with us, we will be delighted to hear from you.
contact.subtitleTwo: Tell us what you need and we will get back to you as soon as possible.
contact.serviceLine: Catering for fairs, private events and celebrations.
contact.formSuccess: Thanks, we have received your request.
